name: Thunderbranch
descs: When inflicting [Burst] Potency with Skill effects, Inflict 1 [Burst] Potency and +1 [Burst] Count on target.
When inflicting [Burst] Potency with Skill effects, Inflict 2 [Burst] Potency and +1 [Burst] Count on target.

When inflicting [Burst] Potency with Skill effects, Inflict 3 [Burst] Potency and +1 [Burst] Count on target.

If the Skill's Affinity was Gloom, inflict 3 [Burst] Potency and +2 [Burst] Count instead.
